title: GEEZY Stackable Flower Pot Planters – Set of 4, Large Black Plastic Tiered Design for Outdoor Vertical Garden, for Herbs, Strawberries, Flowers – Space-Saving Durable Pots for Gardening Enthusiasts
features: VERSATILE PLANTERS: Ideal for a variety of plants, these stackable planters accommodate flowers, strawberries, and herbs. The clever design ensures a thriving vertical garden in limited space.
SPACE-SAVING DESIGN: With a stacked height of 65 cm, these large plant pots maximize your outdoor area. Perfect for creating a tiered planter outdoor setup that is both stylish and functional.
DURABLE AND STYLISH: Made from sturdy plastic, these planters offer long-lasting use while adding a modern touch to your garden. Their sleek black finish enhances any outdoor decor.
PERFECT GIFT: A great present for gardening enthusiasts, these pots are suitable for any occasion. Ideal for those looking to start a vertical garden or grow strawberry plants and herbs efficiently.

SPECIFICATIONS: Item Dimensions: Width: 42 cm, Depth: 35.5 cm, Height: 21 cm / Weight: 520 g / Package Dimensions: Height: 21.5 cm, Width: 42 cm, Depth: 39 cm / Package Weight: 1570 g / Material: Plastic / Color: Black / Stacked: Height 65 cm, length 42 cm, width 40 cm.
